title: Building Agent Interfaces: Lessons from Chrome DevTools (MCP) for Agents — Michael Hablich, Google
summary: Michael Hablich describes lessons from building Chrome DevTools MCP, a tool interface for agents. The key insights include decomposing monolithic tools into focused ones, using semantic summaries instead of raw output, rewriting error messages for agent self-healing, and measuring interface efficiency via tokens per successful outcome.
